name: claude-mem
description: Memory compression system for Claude Code - persist context across sessions
skillInstructions: Claude-Mem is a persistent memory system. When a memory-related task arises, use the claude-mem MCP tools with the 3-layer retrieval workflow: 1) `search` to get a compact index of observation IDs, 2) `timeline` to see chronological context around interesting IDs, 3) `get_observations` to fetch full details only for filtered IDs. Never fetch full details before filtering.

interface.shortDescription: Persistent memory and context compression across Kimi Code CLI sessions.
interface.longDescription: claude-mem captures coding-session activity, compresses it into reusable observations, and injects relevant context back into future Kimi Code CLI sessions via lifecycle hooks and MCP search tools.
